subject: fix(mobile): improve touch targets, safe areas, and modal constraints
body:
- ZoomControls: Buttons scaled to w-10 h-10 (40px) on mobile, compact
  w-6 h-6 on desktop. Previously fixed at 24px everywhere.
- Reader mode header: Add safe-area-inset-top for notched devices
- Reader mode page dots: Replace 8px dots with 32px numbered buttons
  (tappable, accessible, show page number). Add safe-area-inset-bottom.
- Reader mode Prev/Next: Increase mobile tap area (py-2 vs py-1.5)
- InstallInstructionsModal: Add max-h-[90vh] + overflow-y-auto to
  prevent content overflow on short mobile viewports

Tags: mobile, ux, touch-targets, safe-area, accessibility
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: code-review-sweep
Semver: patch
